narrative:
Canal Win-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 338 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a clear Republican lean of 7.4 percentage points.
